---
title: ''
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)

turnout_income <- readRDS("~/Desktop/final-project-Smlfberry/data/turnout_income.rds")
```


```{r plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=4.5, out.width="100%"}
il_scatter <- turnout_income %>%
  filter(state == "IL")
p <- ggplot(il_scatter, aes(x = median_income, y = turnout_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2, color = "#1a3a5c") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#e67e22", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::dollar) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#faf9f6", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#faf9f6", color = NA)
  )
p
```
